name: Special Lien for Deferred Estate Tax

eligibility.description: Available to estates electing to defer tax payments under IRC 6166. Requires a written agreement signed by all parties with an interest in the designated lien property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an executor to elect a specific lien on designated property in lieu of a general estate tax lien or a costly surety bond when deferring estate taxes under section 6166.
